distance_km.note: No reliable web sources found describing a 'Muffin Race' with 25km distance; found a different Muffin Race (6km team sprint relay) in Michigan[1][2]

elevation_m.note: No reliable web sources found for 400m elevation gain on Muffin Race

country.note: Database claims US/Montana, but identified Muffin Race is in Michigan, US[1][2]; no Montana match found

region_state_province.note: Database claims Montana, but identified Muffin Race is in Roscommon, MI[1][2]; Montana races like Lolo to Lolo exist but not named Muffin[3]

discipline.note: Database claims both; identified Muffin Race is freestyle (skate) only[1]

field_size.note: No sources confirm ~100 participants for this Muffin Race

founded.note: Database claims 1990; identified Muffin Race is 33rd edition in 2026, implying ~1993[2]

official_website.note: https://www.crosscutmt.org not confirmed as Muffin Race site; actual Muffin Race registration at crosscountryski.com[1]

race_date.note: Database claims late January; identified Muffin Race is late February (Feb 22)[1][2]
